articles.title: Oil prices rise, stock futures dip after latest flare-up of strikes between U.S. and Iran
articles.description: Oil prices rose and U.S. stock-index futures slipped on Sunday, after the U.S. and Iran continued their tit-for-tat attacks around the Strait of Hormuz over the weekend.

articles.title: ‘Trump accounts’ are great — if you’re already rich
articles.description: They’re a poor deal for most other people.

articles.title: Why Citigroup is the one to watch when banks report earnings this week
articles.description: Among the largest U.S. banks, Citigroup is expected to show the greatest improvement by one important measure. But it still has a long way to go to reach its own performance target.

articles.title: You don’t have to be rich to be financially independent. Here’s how to take control of your money.
articles.description: Relying on a high salary or a hot stock is a dangerous trap. Why the most secure people plan for sudden crisis.

articles.title: Earnings estimates have been following an unusual pattern this time around
